metadata.title: Abstract Security - High/Critical event analytics rule
metadata.description: Scheduled Microsoft Sentinel analytics rule over AbstractEventLogs_CL. Raises an incident for high/critical Abstract events and surfaces the Abstract insight id as the 'AbstractInsightId' custom detail so the Abstract-Verdict playbook can run the agentic verdict. Maps IP and Account entities.
metadata.author: Abstract Security - Solutions Engineering

properties.displayName: Abstract Security - High or Critical event
properties.description: An Abstract-delivered event with high or critical severity was observed. Enriched/normalized upstream by the Abstract pipeline; the AbstractInsightId custom detail enables the agentic Verdict playbook.
properties.query:
[concat(parameters('customTableName'), '
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend e = AbstractEvent
| extend AbstractSeverity = tolower(tostring(e.severity)),
         SrcIpAddr = coalesce(tostring(e.source_ipv4), tostring(e.source_address)),
         ActorUsername = coalesce(tostring(e.user_name), tostring(e.user_id)),
         AbstractInsightId = tostring(e.id),
         EventProduct = tostring(e.product),
         EventMessage = coalesce(tostring(e.message), Message)
| where AbstractSeverity in ("high", "critical")
| project TimeGenerated, AbstractSeverity, EventProduct, EventMessage, SrcIpAddr, ActorUsername, AbstractInsightId')]
